Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Continued To May-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on May 24 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. Status on close of Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
